metadata.description: Determines whether motif-level features carry unique structural information about capability domains beyond graph-level statistics. Uses McFadden R² decomposition, residualized clustering, conditional MI, domain normalization, and CCA.

cca_analysis.interpretation: 7/10 canonical dimensions significant: moderate linear overlap, but some orthogonal dimensions remain.

verdict.evidence_summary: Unique motif R²=0.0184 (CI: [0.0213, 0.0448]) — CI excludes 0. Residualized motif NMI=0.2643 (p=0.0010). MI retained after residualization: 23.6%. CCA: 7/10 dimensions significant. Domain-normalized motif NMI K=8: 0.6594.
